name: customer-onboarding-multi-step-form-application
description: Customer Onboarding Multi-Step Form Application â€” generate runnable codebase in react for the uploaded user stories

features.name: Personal Information
features.description: Personal Information: title (dropdown) [Must select a title], firstName [Required field], middleName, lastName [Required field], dateOfBirth (date) [Must be 18 years or older], nationality (dropdown) [Must select nationality], nationalInsuranceNumber [Valid UK NI number format required]

features.name: Contact Details
features.description: Contact Details: email (email) [Valid email address required], confirmEmail (email) [Must match email address], mobilePhone (phone) [Valid UK mobile number required], homePhone (phone) [Valid UK phone number if provided], preferredContactMethod (radio) [Must select preferred contact method]

features.name: Residency Information
features.description: Residency Information: addressLine1 [Required field], addressLine2, city [Required field], county, postcode [Valid UK postcode required], country (dropdown) [Must select country], residencyStatus (dropdown) [Must select residency status], yearsAtAddress (number) [Must be a positive number], visaType (dropdown) [Required if residency status is visa-based] {Show only if residencyStatus is 'Work Visa' or 'Student Visa'}, visaExpiryDate (date) [Required if visa type is selected, must be future date] {Show only if visaType is filled}, proofOfAddress (file) [Must upload valid document]

features.name: Military Service Declaration
features.description: Military Service Declaration: servedInMilitary (radio) [Must select yes or no], branch (dropdown) [Required if served in military] {Show only if servedInMilitary is 'Yes'}, rank [Required if served in military] {Show only if servedInMilitary is 'Yes'}, serviceStartDate (date) [Required if served in military] {Show only if servedInMilitary is 'Yes'}, serviceEndDate (date) [Required if served in military, must be after start date] {Show only if servedInMilitary is 'Yes'}, dischargeType (dropdown) [Required if served in military] {Show only if servedInMilitary is 'Yes'}, veteranId {Show only if servedInMilitary is 'Yes'}
